summary: Public Booking Calendar feature fully tested. All backend APIs working (13/13 tests passed). Frontend UI tested via Playwright - public booking page loads correctly, booking submission creates pending_approval appointment, confirmation page shows. Browser crashes on therapist dashboard due to resource constraints (known issue from previous iterations).

issues: Past dates in calendar are correctly disabled but may not have visual distinction

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PublicBookingPage.js correctly fetches therapist info via /api/public/therapist/{id}
VERIFIED: Available slots fetched from /api/public/therapist/{id}/slots with date param
VERIFIED: Booking submitted to /api/public/book creates client account if needed
VERIFIED: New bookings have status 'pending_approval' and require therapist action
VERIFIED: TherapistOverview.js has pendingApprovals section with approve/decline buttons (data-testid='pending-approvals-section')
VERIFIED: AssistantDashboard.js also has same pendingApprovals section for assistant access
VERIFIED: TherapistProfileSettings.js has public_booking_enabled toggle with data-testid='public-booking-toggle'
VERIFIED: Profile settings show shareable booking link when public booking is enabled
VERIFIED: /api/appointments/{id}/decline changes status to 'declined' with reason

success_rate.frontend: Public booking flow tested via UI - works correctly. Dashboard verification via API due to browser resource constraints

seed_data_creation: Multiple test bookings created via public booking flow - can be cleaned up by declining/deleting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Booking Calendar feature is fully implemented and working. Backend tests comprehensive. Browser automation crashes after therapist login due to resource constraints - use API testing or increase browser resources. Public booking page at /book/{therapist_id} works perfectly.

GET /api/public/therapist/{therapist_id}.notes: Returns therapist name, qualifications, specializations, session_duration, consultation_fee
Returns available slots based on therapist availability settings

POST /api/public/book.notes: Creates client account if new, creates appointment with pending_approval status

GET /api/appointments/pending-approval.notes: Returns list of pending bookings with client details

POST /api/appointments/{id}/approve.notes: Changes status to 'scheduled', creates notification for client

POST /api/appointments/{id}/decline.notes: Changes status to 'declined', includes reason if provided

Public Booking Page UI (/book/{therapist.notes: Three-step wizard: 1) Select Date/Time, 2) Enter Details, 3) Confirmation. Works end-to-end.

Therapist Dashboard (pending approvals s.notes: TherapistOverview.js has data-testid='pending-approvals-section' with approve/decline buttons

Assistant Dashboard (pending approvals s.notes: AssistantDashboard.js has same pending approvals section as therapist

api_test_results.public_slots: 200 OK - Returns 47+ slots for next 7 days
api_test_results.public_book: 200 OK - Creates booking with pending_approval status
api_test_results.pending_approval: 200 OK - Returns pending bookings with client details
